text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a day out, I accompany Agnes<n>Digital to a
shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I talked about the<n>release event
tied to the photo books<n>I bought before? Turns out
I won! So,<n>we need to prepare.
choice_data_list: What do we need to buy?
What do we need to buy?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Deodorant.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Um, don't you get sweaty at these<n>kinds of
things?! I know I can't help<n>it, but I get all hot and
flustered every<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I don't want the people around<n>me getting a
whiff of that! Or, heavens<n>forbid, have one of my
oshis smell it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Then, people will start spreading<n>rumors that Uma
simps are stinky!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I wouldn't be able to live with myself!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
On another point, recently in all these<n>races, I've
had lots of opportunities<n>to be near other
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So I need to be very careful about<n>what deodorant
I choose. I'm using<n>unscented right now, but I've
been<n>thinking it'd be nice to find something<n>that
kills all smells...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Like something that would get rid of<n>the scent of
my shampoo and<n>conditioner as well. I wanna be
totally<n>odorless so I can better sense the
fragrance of my Umas.
Totally odorless, huh? Hm.Interesting.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyagh! Tachyon?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, here I am walking around,<n>minding my
own business, when the<n>most intriguing idea
grace my ears—a<n>deodorant that makes you
completely<n>odorless... Shall I try my hand at it?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In a previous study, I had managed to<n>create a
liquid with very strong<n>deodorizing properties.
Improving said<n>solution might produce something
akin to what you're in search of.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa... Look at your eyes<n>gleaming with
excitement... So<n>wuvely...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Not at all! Have at it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh... That's a good<n>answer. Well, if
you'll excuse me for<n>now...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sniff, sniff... Hmmm, I see...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hyaaargyahg!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, next I'd like to observe your<n>physical
reactions and the quantity of<n>sweat produced
while under the<n>conditions in which you would use
deodorant.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh. It doesn't appear Digital iscapable of responding at the moment.Well then, Trainer, what situation doyou think would be most appropriate?
choice_data_list: Maybe a place she wants to go to?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Before and after a race, you say? In<n>other words,
a situation that produces<n>both feelings of passion
and anxiety.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I know of an<n>environment that can
replicate a<n>similar state and assist us in<n>obtaining
data a great deal faster than<n>running.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Agnes Tachyon leads us to...<n>an
amusement park roller coaster.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm sitting next to Tachyon?! O-oh, be<n>still, my
beating heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sh-she's so close... Pant, pant...Oh... m-m-my heart! Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your breathing is quite irregular... So<n>tell me, have
you begun sweating?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Too... close! Your hair is nearly<n>brushing my cheek!
Nononono!<n>Touching Umamusume is off limits!<n>But
there's nowhere to<n>ruuuuunnngyahhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear it, Trainer? When the<n>coaster
dropped, Tachyon let out a<n>little gasp!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Her intellectual demeanor slipped for<n>just a split
second! Do you know<n>how rare of a moment that
was?! My<n>heart won't stop pounding!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Wonderful job, Digital! That<n>heightened
state of yours didn't<n>waver for a second—before,
during, or<n>after the ride!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's fascinating how far beyond the<n>norm you are!
Do you have a limitless<n>supply of endorphins?!
AHAHAHAHA!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Squeal! Oh, Tachyon... You soundlike you're having so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... I'm itching to get back and<n>analyze your
reactions! So, if you<n>don't mind, I'll be off!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm... so... happy!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I catch Agnes Digital as she falls<n>under a fainting
spell. It seems the<n>two of them had a really good
time.<n>What more could I ask for?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Agnes Digital<n>comes to me with
a deodorant cream<n>in hand, happily reporting the
exceptional quality of Agnes<n>Tachyon's work.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
A place she wants to go to, hmm?<n>Then let us
wake her up if you think<n>such a location will
replicate the state<n>of excitement that sometimes
overcomes her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmph... I wasn't expecting this from<n>you, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I chose it because the cakes are<n>really good. You
don't like places like<n>this?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say that. If it is demanded<n>of me, I'll
say it all depends on<n>what's on the menu.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As soon as the cake and tea we<n>order arrives,
Agnes Tachyon digs in.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Oh my! My entire brain is<n>inundated in
sweetness!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Mmmm, very nice. An eccentric<n>degree of sugar
content... Very much<n>to my liking.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The cake's bizarre color dampens<n>one's appetite,
suppressing the<n>amount of dopamine released.
Perhaps it's to prevent the<n>overconsumption of
sugar?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Tachyon... you're soprecious how you're enjoying thecake...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Whoops, I shouldn't get carried<n>away. Digital,
let's check your<n>condition.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Face flushed, breathing irregular...<n>Despite the
relaxed environment you<n>seem to be in quite the
state of<n>excitement. Heh-heh.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I think have enough data<n>to begin
crafting your custom<n>deodorant. Yes... first off, I'll
need<n>some antibacterial—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Look at Tachyon lost in<n>thought! Record!
I must preserve her<n>expression on video!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital looks overjoyed as<n>she watches
the engrossed Agnes<n>Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Agnes Digital<n>comes to me with
a deodorant cream<n>in hand, happily reporting the
exceptional quality of Agnes<n>Tachyon's work.
